title: MJ: Idea Logger
description: Simple commands to save ideas to a file on your server, as well as read them back and remove them!
body:
# Modding Journeys: Idea Logger

`/idea <text>`: To add a new idea to the file

`/removeidea <text>`: To remove an idea with matching text

`/ideas`: To view all ideas

All ideas are saved to a file, *ideas.txt* in the root of your server directory.
